title: Verb
description: A Verb is the core action of a business domain — something that can be performed on or by a Noun. Verbs describe the operations that drive the business forward and produce meaningful state changes.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the verb.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this verb does.

noun.description: The name of the Noun this verb belongs to.

input.description: The attributes required as input to perform this verb.

output.description: The attributes returned or updated as a result of this verb.
